title: hieracium porrectum subsp. elongatiforme
intro: Hieracium porrectum subsp. elongatiforme, a lesser-known member of the dandelion family, is a plant species native to certain regions of Europe. It is known to possess medicinal properties, with a history of use in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its potential health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to support liver function and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium porrectum subsp. elongatiforme is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
